name: PostgreSQL Job Board Leak
description: A PostgreSQL-backed job board is vulnerable to UNION-based injection. Leverage PostgreSQL-specific catalog tables to discover and extract the flag.
briefing: HireWave, a tech job board running on PostgreSQL, has a job search feature that's vulnerable to SQL injection. Unlike MySQL, PostgreSQL uses pg_catalog instead of information_schema (or both). Navigate PostgreSQL's system catalogs — pg_tables, pg_class, pg_attribute — to discover a hidden table containing the flag.
objective: Use UNION-based SQL injection with PostgreSQL-specific system catalogs to find the hidden table and extract the flag.
author: h4ck0rman
